description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen display on the front. The screen is illuminated and shows a colorful grid of app icons, a status bar at the top, and a subtle notch housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The device has a slim metallic or plastic frame with visible side buttons and speaker grills on the bottom edge. The back and sides are not visible, but the overall design suggests a premium build typical of high-end mobile phones. The phone's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving it a polished appearance. This object is commonly found in urban environments, used for communication, navigation, and various digital tasks.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, rounded corners, and a slim metallic frame. The illuminated display shows colorful app icons and a top notch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full touchscreen display with app icons, a central notch at the top, and speaker grills at the bottom edge.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the phone's slimness, metallic frame, and the flush alignment of the screen with the body.
description_view_2: Angled front view emphasizing the notch, screen curvature, and the arrangement of app icons.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing side buttons and the phone's thin, uniform edge.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful grid of app icons, a status bar with time and signal indicators at the top, and a wallpaper with a gradient background. The notch at the top houses the front camera and sensors.
attribute_camera_placement: A single front-facing camera is located within the central notch at the top of the screen. No rear cameras are visible in these views.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible on the left edge, likely for volume control and mute. No buttons are visible on the front or right edge in these views.
